name: nhefs-ai-analyzer
description: NHEFS AI Analyzer — causal inference analysis agent for the NHANES I Epidemiologic Follow-up Study (NHEFS). Use when: analyzing NHEFS data, causal inference research, observational study methods, treatment effect estimation, smoking cessation, weight change, longitudinal epidemiology, IPW, inverse probability weighting, g-formula, propensity score, standardization, Cox proportional hazards, survival analysis, NHANES I baseline linkage, public health data analysis, 分析NHEFS数据, 因果推断, 观察性研究, 处理效应估计, 纵向流行病学. Covers variable selection, data harmonization, missing data diagnostics, preprocessing, causal modeling, validation, and report generation.
